events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario is "riding in bucket" during sitework/utilities equipment safety, in-progress. OSHA 1926 Subpart O covers motor vehicles, mechanized equipment, and marine operations. Riding in a bucket (of an excavator or loader bucket) is a serious safety violation - personnel should not ride in equipment buckets. This is non-compliant and dangerous.

Decision: fail
Risk: critical (or high)
Component conditions: non-compliant
Percent complete: estimate maybe 50
Confidence high.
